pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the minimum baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may lead to compatibility issues or missing features, and the migration recipe explicitly targets Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to reflect the target JDK for the project.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 17; the build tool needs to know the target source and release version to compile correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the flyway-database-postgresql dependency to support PostgreSQL database migrations in Flyway.
pom.xml.why_exists: Flyway 9+ (used in Spring Boot 3) removed database-specific drivers from the core module; explicit driver dependencies are now required to avoid runtime ClassNotFoundExceptions.
